heading: Motor-vehicle licenses for Sequoia National Park as applicable; limitation of privileges within park
label: 80c Motor-vehicle licenses for Sequoia National Park as applicable; limitation of privileges within park
text: Any motor-vehicle license issued for Sequoia National Park shall be applicable to Kings Canyon National Park, and vice versa: , That in order to insure the permanent preservation of the wilderness character of the Kings Canyon National Park the Secretary of the Interior may, in his discretion, limit the character and number of privileges that he may grant within the Kings Canyon National Park.Provided
notes: Amendments1950—Act , struck out last sentence which restricted concessionaires to a five-year term.Aug. 17, 1950
amendments: Amendments1950—Act , struck out last sentence which restricted concessionaires to a five-year term.Aug. 17, 1950
